title: ferray-stats: no initial= or where= parameters on reductions
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's reductions support initial= (starting value for the accumulator) and where= (boolean mask for conditional reduction). ferray-stats has neither. initial= is useful for empty-array behavior and for reductions where the identity element matters. where= enables masked computation without materializing a masked array: np.sum(arr, where=mask).
